AC1.description: RunCompleteScreen no longer renders an empty <dd>
AC1.evidence: web/src/pages/RunCompleteScreen.js:25-30 replaces the stray <dd> row with a wrapping <h3>+<dl>; existing coverage-gaps.spec.js stat-grid guard still passes.

AC2.description: PrepScreen exposes the round number as a semantic heading
AC2.evidence: web/src/pages/PrepScreen.js:68-73 adds <h2 class="run-round-heading"> so screenshot sidecars pick it up; visual regeneration is deferred with the rest of screenshot follow-up.

AC3.description: [Req X-Y] prefixes for previously untagged IDs 4-S, 4-T, 4-U
AC3.evidence: challenge-isolation.test.js and round-resolution.test.js now carry the missing tags; grep for each ID returns ≥1 tagged test.

AC4.description: Negative regression test for [Req 14-H] (mycelium is progression-only)
AC4.evidence: mushroom-progression.test.js gains two source-level guards that fail if battle-engine.js or the ghost-budget block references mycelium/level tokens.

outOfScopeFix.title: createChallengeRun loop ordering bug violated [Req 4-S]
outOfScopeFix.description: Inserting each player's game_run_players row and then generating that player's shop offer inside a single loop meant the first iteration saw no opponent row, so lookupEligibleCharacterItems silently dropped the min(viewer, opponent) cap for the challenger.
outOfScopeFix.fix: app/server/services/run-service.js:988-1006 now enrols both players first, then generates shop offers in a second pass.
outOfScopeFix.flaggedFor: reviewer confirmation — this expanded task scope beyond constraint C1, but the test would have remained failing otherwise.

followUps: S1 — generate missing auth / characters / history / settings / challenge screenshots + desktop variants

P1 — assert rewards-card rating-delta is scrollIntoView-reachable on mobile
